principle: Content must solve reader problem, not present yourself
Replace bureaucratic text with human specifics
explanation: X.copy|bureaucratic -> human + specifics; add: weekday + full_words + duration + fallback_plan; human_text -support_calls eg: "water_off_MON_11may_4-6h_tel:XXX" >> "cold/hot_water_off_until_done"

principle: CV: answer requirements point by point with proof
explanation: X.content|CV: answer requirements point_by_point; skill + proof; NO:biography; NO:pity; NO:"since_school"; admit_gaps_honestly eg: "support_exp, answered_in_socials" >> "talent_for_texts_since_childhood"

principle: Three text qualities: brief, clear, convincing
explanation: X.read|3_qualities: brief (NO:words_without_meaning) + clear (understood_1st_read) + convincing (facts + numbers); brief eg: "in_2_days" >> "in_advance_no_later_than"; clear eg: "contractor_miscalculated" >> "unforeseen_circumstances"; convincing eg: "5x_more_popular, 1M_vs_200K"

principle: Text has 5 editing levels: action, words, sentences, structure, presentation
explanation: X.structure|5_levels: useful_action -> words -> sentences -> structure -> presentation; all_levels_required; NO:words_only == 20%_of_work; clean_words_first_then_up

principle: Useful action: write for reader needs, not your message
explanation: X.content|useful_action: ask "for_whom? what_need? how_help?" NO:"what_I_want_to_say"; structure_around_reader_needs eg: "lightweight_materials, waterproof" >> "rich_history, family_values"; company_story -> separate_page
X.content|different_audiences -> different_pages; NO:one_text_for_all eg: buyers -> properties; employees -> conditions; investors -> finance

principle: Edit direction: bottom-up for existing, top-down for new text
explanation: X.structure|existing_text: bottom_up (words -> sent -> para -> structure); new_text: top_down (structure -> para -> sent -> words) eg: "nano_surface_processing" -> "silicone_coating"
